title: Contact ESDC Media Relations Office - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact ESDC Media Relations Office

### Media enquiries (only)
The following contact information is for media only .
- Media relations telephone number: 1-819-994-5559
- Media relations email: media@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
Media relations responds to calls and emails from the media only, Monday to Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). On statutory holidays, calls and emails will be returned on the next working day.
To help better respond to your enquiries, please include the following information in your requests:
- Your phone number and email address
